description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a dependency_scanning job using the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2. The job runs in the default test stage, allows failure, and exports SP_VERSION by extracting the major and minor version from CI_SERVER_VERSION with a sed command. It then executes a docker run of the GitLab Dependency Scanning image at tag $SP_VERSION, passing the DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS environment variable (default false), mounting the repository at /code and the Docker socket, and scans the code. The job stores the generated gl-dependency-scanning-report.json as an artifact. No additional triggers or deployment targets are defined.
